name: 簡德年
objective: This course is designed to provide students with both the theoretical foundations and practical insights of digital transformation. It explores how emerging technologies reshape business models through innovative forms such as the sharing economy, FinTech, and user-generated content. By combining literature reviews, case studies, group discussions, and presentations, students will develop the ability to critically analyze digital transformation strategies and propose innovative business models. The course assessment includes a midterm team report and a final individual project, ensuring both collaborative and independent learning outcomes.

scorePolicy:
Attendance and Class Participation: 30%
Journal Readings and Presentations: 20%
Group Project Presentations: 30%
Final Presentations: 20%
materials:
Self-compiled materials will be used in this course. Slides and case studies will be prepared and provided during class sessions.

1. Eric Lamarre, Kate Smaje, Rodney Zemmel (2023). The McKinsey Guide to Outcompeting in the Age of Digital and AI. Wiley. ISBN: 978-1394207114

2. Alex Zarifis, Despo Ktoridou, Leonidas Efthymiou, Xusen Cheng (2023). Business Digital Transformation: Selected Cases from Industry Leaders. Palgrave Macmillan. ISBN: 978-3031336645
consultation: Office Hours: Monday 16:00-18:00Thursday 11:00-13:00Please schedule a discussion time via email in advance.
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG8：尊嚴就業與經濟發展（Decent Work and Economic Growth）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）SDG11：永續城市與社區（Sustainable Cities and Communities）SDG12：負責任的消費與生產（Responsible Consumption and Production）SDG17：夥伴關係（Partnerships for the Goals）
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 使用生成式 AI 進行課堂即時互動（Use generative AI for real-time classroom interaction）
